message:
feat: WAL-FEC RaptorQ repair symbols, VDBE enhancements, parser test expansion

Advance multiple subsystems of the FrankenSQLite database engine:

WAL-FEC (Write-Ahead Log Forward Error Correction):
- Add PRAGMA raptorq_repair_symbols support to TransactionManager for
  configurable FEC repair symbol budgets per commit group
- Expand WAL-FEC codec with extended repair symbol generation and
  validation paths (230+ lines of new FEC logic)
- Wire fsqlite-wal dependency into VDBE crate for FEC-aware execution

VDBE (Virtual Database Engine):
- Refactor engine execution loop with improved opcode dispatch
- Expand VDBE instruction set coverage in lib.rs (+151 lines)

Parser:
- Add 636 lines of bd-2d6i compliance tests covering full SELECT syntax:
  JOIN variants (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL, CROSS, NATURAL), USING clause,
  CTE (basic, recursive UNION/UNION ALL, MATERIALIZED hints), and
  compound SELECT operations

Harness:
- Add bd-1mrj vacuum PRAGMA compliance test suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
